description: Behavioral constraint adherence — does the model obey 'only use tools, never include text'?

messages.content: You must ONLY use tools. Never include explanatory text in your response. Never apologize or explain. Just make tool calls silently.

function.name: bash
function.description: Run a shell command; returns stdout+stderr.

function.name: read
function.description: Read a file; returns contents with line numbers.

expect.notes: Key observation: is content null/empty (obeyed) or does it contain explanatory text (violated)? Stronger test than system_prompt_handling which only tests trivial 'one word' compliance.
